channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

item.title: China evacuates over 1 million as Typhoon Bavi brings winds and rain to Taiwan and Japan's islands - The Washington Post
